description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a smooth, seamless surface and three prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body. The barrel is uniformly colored in a clean, matte white finish, giving it a modern and industrial appearance. The top is slightly domed with a subtle rim, and there are no visible openings, spouts, or bungs on the lid, suggesting it is fully sealed. The sides are unadorned, lacking any handles, labels, or markings, which contributes to its minimalist look. The base is flat, allowing the barrel to stand upright and provide stable support for stacking or storage. Its robust construction and size make it suitable for use in urban, industrial, or warehouse environments for storage or transport of liquids or bulk materials.
description: A large, white, cylindrical metal barrel with three horizontal reinforcement bands and a smooth, sealed top. It has a clean, industrial look with no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, domed top and two visible reinforcement bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sealed top with a slight central indentation and all three reinforcement bands.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with a clear view of the barrel's cylindrical shape and smooth surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the domed top and reinforcement bands, with no additional features visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
